last_improvement.description: Enhanced LLM prompt with prescriptive anti-stagnation rules: stalled miner→aligner, stalled aligner→miner, oscillating→miner. Matches alpha.0's cyborg architecture for breaking stuck states.
last_improvement.notes: Previous improvement (001): LLM objective feature bug fix. Both improvements target LLM effectiveness. BLOCKED: No cogames auth token in secrets - cannot upload to freeplay.
